hook: AI keeps giving you 5-step bullet lists when you just needed one sentence.
caption:
AI keeps giving you 5-step bullet lists when you just needed one sentence.

Here's what's actually happening: the AI doesn't know if you're a beginner or an expert. It doesn't know if you want the full picture or just the answer. So it defaults to thorough. Safe. Padded.

And you sit there deleting 80% of it.

The fix isn't a better prompt. It's a better profile.

When you tell AI *how you think* — that you're a big-picture person who hates being walked through steps you already know, that you want the conclusion first and the reasoning only if you ask — it stops performing helpfulness and starts being helpful.

There's a difference between an AI that's trying to cover its bases and one that actually knows your baseline.

One of them wastes your time. The other one feels like it's been paying attention.

That's the whole point of BootFile. Not prompts. Not hacks. A profile that travels with you so every conversation starts from *you* — not from zero.

Drop a 🎯 if you've rage-deleted a bullet list this week.
